textByHash.dc8f299217f591f18bf1c422085f85b0106d829a: I am Al Shabim, greetings on behalf of the Bedabin nomads.
textByHash.441f7c7341b407d4aeef989eac02473c2cc5efa1: Huh! You have been talking to the guards at the mining camp. Or worse, that cowardly mercenary captain. Al Zaba Bhasim does not exist, he is a figment of their imagination!
textByHash.d015ea628d862efa677bf19c831369b7e881bcd4: Go back and tell this captain that if he wants to find this man he should search for him personally. See how much of his own time he would like to waste.
textByHash.234fee19d73fa0a57463e5e54f773d88e94e8d22: I've already explained that he doesn't exist. Now, can we move on?
textByHash.b2ddd75b95fb7037792a63417475f8e130190942: I am Al Shabim, greetings on behalf of the Bedabin nomads. Now... what can I do for you?
textByHash.a632c0d8511d9626b0234401262c14c31e66e884: Oh yes, well that is interesting. Our sweet pineapples are renowned throughout the whole of Kharid ! And I'll give you one if you do me a favour?
textByHash.f9e05b0bd8fb00f58b0cf6c475a8e670cb65688a: Captain Siad at the mining camp is holding some secret information. It is very important to us and we would like you to get it for us. It gives details of an interesting, yet ancient weapon.
textByHash.6446a9bce390f69c8b1692cd29ed53eec885b111: We would gladly share this information with you. All you have to do is gain access to his private room upstairs. We have a key for the chest that contains this information. Are you interested in our deal?
textByHash.bab68b2b76ad3a13024fed2426212c41a0be49b2: Here is a copy of the key that should give you access to the chest.
textByHash.9ac88ef197cd27b9883ed526761cf2753631d405: Bring us back the plans inside the chest, they should be sealed. All haste to you Effendi!
textByHash.cc320d12f170ef29c4c8a18db0da320fb76f1733: How very careless of you! Here is another key, don't lose it this time !
textByHash.e105ac76300c7a0d09ea0e0c8e29838668439b99: Aha! I see you have the plans. This is great! However, these plans do indeed look very technical. My people have further need of your skills.
textByHash.fd256ee8adb3a4760f53e40c47afed5c20f2a2b9: If you can help us to manufacture this item, we will share its secret with you. Does this deal interest you effendi?
textByHash.e1702a080f3eb000ccf84403578dc064968de447: Great, we need the following items: a bar of pure bronze, 10 feathers and a hammer. Bring them to me and we'll continue to make the item.
textByHash.c26e6f4b7c81050336f2a9b7a103efa1c4a4f53b: Great, we need the following items: a bar of pure bronze and 10 feathers. Bring them to me and we'll continue to make the item.
textByHash.e72234fc7aa4c6813295ae6b6012b9d142880b14: Great, I can see that you have a bar of bronze. Now we just need some feathers and a hammer before we can continue.
textByHash.a9c06864908d93f296af568590afaf402ce1d23e: Great, I can see that you have some feathers. Now we just need a bar of bronze and a hammer before we can continue.
textByHash.03fa9f52138692b91d0c90821fa1307a9c2f66d2: Great, I can see that you have a bar of bronze. Now we just need some feathers before we can continue.
textByHash.97c705b0b8f5b7d0b806304b0c16cb6142580168: Great, I can see that you have some feathers. Now we just need a bar of bronze before we can continue.
textByHash.627755f46138e3aad5c6259ff826c8d3a2f1f45b: Great, I can see that you have some feathers and a bar of Bronze, but you just need a hammer now.
textByHash.bc1a883ecdca4fb34b73514f77cbfd4685268517: Great, I can see that you have some feathers, a bar of Bronze and a hammer. Are you still willing to help make the weapon?
textByHash.1020de28b04dfbe940843f8435a7770308232274: Okay Effendi, you need to follow the plans. You will need some special tools for this... There is an anvil in the other tent. You have my permission to use it, but show the plans to the guard.
textByHash.2703ba45482d05663e9cb02c80bc2da8bdc1713d: You have the plans and all the items needed. You should be able to complete the item on your own. Please bring me the item when it is finished.
textByHash.43749f5af471bd3b6a546e65e82d25f5a0baa2fd: Come back if you change your mind!
textByHash.de8a2a7d3a4b38ed565a89e6e649d79ee126c674: We will take the technical plans for the weapon as well.
textByHash.2286dfa832def020e06322304673aabc00c70cab: We are forever grateful for this gift. My advisors have discovered some secrets which we will share with you.
textByHash.872faee6f09f49dbf3650aa981b95e8835f8596c: Please accept this selection of six bronze throwing darts as a token of our appreciation.
textByHash.146dd9412b2a9ccd5b48ec62db8ba690f56a60c0: I'll take that key off your hands as well effendi! Many thanks!
textByHash.cd1f9168e7c7653c3b3f229cbf794c44e2ff905a: Oh, and here is your pineapple!
textByHash.3a0ecb43a3bb64f0a5b797ab9b95c54dc9fcaeae: Many thanks with your help previously Effendi!
textByHash.2cc273f9e95eb8f17b676f88cb3f48b219862fe5: Here is another pineapple, try not to lose this one.
textByHash.77e9e930b1064176d0cfe4892a8af3c912dcfcf2: I am Al Shabim Effendi! I am the leader of the Bedabin peoples!
textByHash.e589b1dc752ef615d429fdeb619404a5afb66a23: Well, we are all very busy most of the time, tending to the pineapples. They are grown in a secret location, to stop thieves from raiding our most precious prize.
textByHash.1eed0e63d8021e1cb184b941806e6b7016072600: This is the home of the Bedabin. We're a peaceful tribe of desert dwellers. Some idiots call us 'Tenti's', a childish name borne of ignorance.
textByHash.7579aeccf2801bf87056e59bc04bce81c90022db: We're renowned for surviving in the harshest desert climate. We also grow the 'Bedabin ambrosia.'... A pineapple of such delicious sumptiousness that it defies description.
textByHash.956dbc8d153744bf87355b951349d66af320fd57: Take a look around our camp if you like!
